scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:learn"
scripts.dev:kill-ports: powershell -NoProfile -Command "8080,20579 | ForEach-Object { Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $_ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }"
scripts.dev:api: dotenv -e .env -o -- cross-env PORT=8080 pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev
scripts.db:setup: pnpm run db:enable-pgvector && pnpm run db:push-force && pnpm run db:migrate
